channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  3. Valve: We're 'Hard at Work' on Steam Deck 2  PCMag
  4. Valve ‘Working Very Hard’ To Get Steam Deck Back In Stock Amid Ongoing RAMaggedon  Kotaku
  5. Valve Confirms Ongoing Steam Deck 2 Development—A Long Wait Remains  TechPowerUp

item.title: The 1st 'Alien: Isolation 2' teaser is here, and the setting looks eerily familiar - Space
item.description:
1. The 1st 'Alien: Isolation 2' teaser is here, and the setting looks eerily familiar  Space
  2. Alien Isolation sequel officially teased but key detail is causing skepticism  Indy100
  3. Sega and Creative Assembly share surprise Alien: Isolation sequel teaser for Alien Day 2026  Eurogamer.net
  4. Waiting For Alien: Isolation 2? Here Are Some Great Horror Alternatives On Xbox  Pure Xbox
  5. Alien Isolation 2 Teaser Released by Sega – More News Coming  games.gg

item.title: The Expanse RPG Is A Letdown As A Big Fan Of The Sci-Fi Show - Kotaku
item.description:
1. The Expanse RPG Is A Letdown As A Big Fan Of The Sci-Fi Show  Kotaku
  2. We went hands-on with 'The Expanse: Osiris Reborn', and it's a hard sci-fi 'Mass Effect' successor with show-stealing zero-G sections  Space
  3. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn plays like a Mass Effect-like sci-fi adventure in fine form, but its developer's use of AI raises some difficult questions  Eurogamer.net
  4. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn PS5 Hands-On Preview - Massive Mass Effect Vibes In The Best Way Possible  PlayStation Universe
  5. Do You Need to Watch The Expanse Before Osiris Reborn Comes Out?  GameRant
